handler.description: Name of the handler script in ~/.config/moadim/handlers/ to run when the schedule fires. May be given with or without a file extension: resolution tries an exact match first, then appends .sh, .py, .js, .rb, .pl, .bash, .zsh (e.g. "send-report" matches send-report.sh).

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON key-value data stored alongside the job

schedule.description: Cron expression. Supports @hourly, @daily, @weekly, @monthly, @yearly, @annually, or standard 5-field syntax (min hour dom month dow). @reboot and @midnight are not supported.
